description: Silver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortStainless steel strap with a butterfly claspSilver dial with silver coloured hands Brand logo across the left of the dial and date aperture at the 3 hour marrkScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 100 meters,  wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing.Warranty: 2 years
